sections.title: Information We Collect
sections.content: PaintKit does not collect personal information. Uploaded images are never sent to a server — all processing happens entirely in your browser.

sections.title: Image Processing
sections.content: Uploaded images are temporarily stored in sessionStorage and are automatically deleted when you close the browser tab. They are never stored on servers or shared with third parties.

sections.title: Cookies and Analytics
sections.content: PaintKit currently does not use cookies or user analytics tools.

sections.title: Advertising
sections.content: In the future, Google AdSense or Kakao AdFit ads may be displayed. These ad services follow their own cookie policies.

sections.title: Contact
sections.content: For inquiries regarding privacy, please contact us through the service's support channel.

sections.title: Use of Service
sections.content: PaintKit may be used freely for personal and commercial purposes. Copyright of generated diagrams belongs to the copyright holder of the original image.

sections.title: Prohibited Use
sections.content: Use of images that infringe third-party copyrights, illegal content, or service abuse is prohibited.

sections.title: Disclaimer
sections.content: PaintKit makes no warranty regarding the quality of generated diagrams. The service is provided 'as is'.
